summary: Plan 11 is implementation-ready after Plans 01, 02, and 04 close. The repaired plan now owns a fail-closed settings-to-runtime schema-mutation policy, complete writer and test-seam migration, all-provider auth failure semantics, an import-aware direct-construction seal, real DDL-denied PostgreSQL request-writer proof, safe task-scoped Git operations, and full static, manifest, staged-hook, Wardline, and downstream closeout gates.

review_basis.head: 4f0ef9d5c8dd20f262c9cf41b53efe64e054fca5
review_basis.baseline: Live Plan 11, Plans 00/01/02/04/10/12, runtime-readiness specification, current LandscapeDB implementation, all web-layer construction sites, auth callers, execution/tutorial tests, CI gates, and Filigree DAG were inspected. Loomweave run 5c792072-2566-463b-9264-85c9efc0741c completed at the recorded HEAD. Its later drift signal was limited by index_diff_get to composer/guided.py and its error-path test, disjoint from every Plan 11 source and test surface. Warpline's stored snapshot was stale and its refresh/reverify calls timed out, so it was treated as advisory-unavailable rather than evidence; the exact 39-patch and direct-call censuses came from the current tree and fresh Loomweave graph.

warnings.detail: Filigree elspeth-25286192ee remains pending, unassigned, and correctly blocked by Plans 01, 02, and 04. Implementation must not begin until all three blockers close, including Plan 02 Task 5 and Plan 04's explicit app.py create_tables policy.

Pre-existing auth-state/audit atomicity defect elspeth-57c4e276a4 is tracked separately: registration or verification can commit auth.db state before Landscape audit persistence, and login audit events are separate transactions. Plan 11 accurately promises response fail-closed behavior only.

The DDL-denied PostgreSQL proof requires Docker and PostgreSQL testcontainer execution; Plan 12 additionally requires live Aurora inventory, DML-only runtime and schema-owner doctor principals, signed max_connections values, and CloudWatch connection-budget evidence. Missing infrastructure is BLOCKED, never a skipped pass.

Warpline's edge snapshot was stale and snapshot capture/reverification timed out. Warpline is advisory by project contract; no clean or low-impact inference was drawn from the unavailable result. Current-source census, fresh Loomweave, tests, and explicit cross-plan inspection supplied the review evidence.

resolved_findings.resolution: Task 2 now migrates all 37 unit and two integration service.LandscapeDB patch seams, keeps LandscapeDB type-only under TYPE_CHECKING, asserts the old patch target is absent, and runs both complete affected files.

The tutorial projection seam test now uses file-backed SQLite, a valid seeded run, bounded artifact stubbing or a complete audited artifact, the real factory, and a persisted run-row assertion instead of reopening an isolated in-memory database.

Auth blast radius now covers local, OIDC, Entra, and Cognito-shaped OIDC middleware and profile paths. All four writer methods are parameterized, and LandscapeRecordError plus schema/infrastructure failures are redacted, logged class-only, and re-raised.

AuthAuditRecorder.create_tables is mandatory with no permissive default; from_settings owns the mapping, exact default/aws-ecs values are tested, and unknown deployment-target vocabulary raises before URL resolution or database opening.

The AST seal recognizes Import and ImportFrom forms, public and helper re-exports, aliases, unaliased qualified chains, raw constructors, in_memory, stored from_url aliases, missing policy, and literal True; synthetic teeth tests replace live source mutation and the real tree pins the exact repaired eight-call map.
Unsafe git add -A and whole-worktree-empty instructions were replaced by exact per-task staged path allowlists, staged no-stash pre-commit execution, and synthetic AST fixtures.

Plan 02 dependency text now distinguishes Task 4's postgres_engine_kwargs from Task 5's from_url engine-kwargs and service wiring; DDL denial is correctly attributed to the runtime database role rather than the ECS task role.

A zero-skip PostgreSQL testcontainer lane proves SQLSTATE 42501 for CREATE, request-time DML through complete WebSettings and AuthAuditRecorder.from_settings, unchanged catalogs, tolerated missing-index non-repair, and missing-additive-table rejection without repair.

The plan now includes complete targeted/unit/integration/testcontainer tests, Ruff, format, whole-source mypy, manifest inventory, staged hooks, git diff, Wardline, and exact Filigree closeout evidence.

The specification now requires post-start request-path nonmutation and unknown-target denial; overview, Plan 10, Plan 12, and Filigree fields carry the DML-only runtime/schema-owner separation, five-file PostgreSQL gate, and exact target/test set.

Plan 12 now binds scenario Aurora identifiers, signed numeric max_connections values, an approved connection budget, exact AWS/RDS DatabaseConnections Maximum sampling, sanitized high-water receipts, and hard headroom inequalities for the short-lived auth engines.
The pre-existing cross-store auth atomicity problem is no longer misrepresented as transactional fail-closed behavior and is durably tracked as P1 bug elspeth-57c4e276a4.

review_history.summary: Initial review found 39 unowned mock seams, an unusable in-memory tutorial test, false local-only auth analysis, permissive policy defaults, incomplete direct-construction enforcement, unsafe shared-worktree Git steps, missing PostgreSQL/runtime proof, and absent static/Wardline/downstream gates.

verification: Three independent reviewers returned PASS after repairs.
Review JSON, Markdown fences, required/forbidden markers, direct-call and patch censuses, Plan 12 five-file contract, and git diff whitespace are mechanically checked before handoff.
Plan 11, Plan 10, and Plan 12 remain pending, unassigned, and dependency-controlled; no implementation issue was claimed or transitioned.
